title: Lunar Nametag Icon
description: Lunar Moon Icon for Offline Nametag Icon Mod
body:
# Lunar Client Nametag Icon (for Offline Nametag Icon Mod)

This resource pack is made for use with the **Offline Nametag Icon** mod and adds the **Lunar Client** logo as a nametag icon above players' heads. It's a subtle cosmetic addition for fans of Lunar Client who want to represent it in their Minecraft world.

## Features
- Lunar Client logo above player nametag
- Designed for use with the [Offline Nametag Icon](https://modrinth.com/mod/offline-nametag-icon) mod
- Minimal and performance-friendly design

> **Note:** I do **not** own the Lunar Client logo. All rights to the Lunar logo and branding belong to **Lunar Client** and their respective owners. This pack is purely fan-made and for personal or community use only.
